rpc.general: A roblox bootrapper written from scratch

appearance.description: Customize the look and feel of the Roblox bootstrapper.

boostrapThemeCard.title: Bootstrapper Theme
boostrapThemeCard.description: Choose between the default Crush theme or a custom XML theme.

serverNotifierCard.title: Server Location Notifier
serverNotifierCard.description: Get notify when client connect to a server.

rpcCard.title: Discord RPC (Crush)
rpcCard.description: Replace the Roblox Rich Presence with Crush's
rpcCard.option2: Display Your Account when playing roblox

gameHistoryCard.title: Your game history
gameHistoryCard.description: View & play your recently played games.

roValraCard.title: Better match making with RoValra
roValraCard.description: Crush have a built-in match making intergration. RoValra's Privacy Policy applies.

joinServerForYouCard.title: Let Crush join server for you
joinServerForYouCard.description: Instead of Roblox match making, we'll use Rovalra API & find the best server.

gameHistory.title: Your game history
gameHistory.description: View & play your recently played games.
gameHistory.gameHistoryEmpty: Your game history is empty. Play some games to see them here! (Note that not every single server is rejoinable)

customVersion.title: Install a custom Roblox version
customVersion.description: Skip update check and download the version. The default value is latest. Invalid version will not get downloaded and will fallback into the latest version.

forceReinstallCard.title: Force Reinstall Roblox
forceReinstallCard.description: Reinstall roblox everytime you launch it.

dontUpdateCard.title: Don't update Roblox
dontUpdateCard.description: Skip Roblox updating and launch instantly

presetCard.title: Preset
presetCard.description: Use Feature Flag Preset built in in crush.

flagTable.searchNotFound: No flags found matching your search.

msaaCard.title: Anti-Aliasing Quality (MSAA)
msaaCard.description: Smooths jagged edges. Higher values look better but may reduce performance.

grassAnimationCard.title: Grass waving animation
grassAnimationCard.description: Adjusts the intensity of grass movement. (0 is no reduction, 999 or any higher number will freezes the grass, 0 & 1 slightly reduced motion and value that greater than 1 is strongly reduced motion, approaching stillness)

overwriteTextureQualityCard.title: Overwrite texture quality level
overwriteTextureQualityCard.description: Forces a custom texture quality level.

graySkyCard.title: Gray Sky
graySkyCard.description: Change the sky to gray, may improve performance.

modManagement.title: Mod Management
modManagement.noModsFound: We found no mods here, Yuppies.

modCards.layoutNote: Mods layout inspired by Frostrap's mods manager
modCards.description: Enable mod loading and set the mod folder location.

cursorCard.title: Cursor
cursorCard.description: Change your Roblox cursor to older versions.

customFontCard.title: Custom Font
customFontCard.description: Change your roblox font to whatever you like.

communityMods.title: Community Mods
communityMods.description: Explore mods created by the community.

notice.title: No mod yet
notice.description: We don't have any community mods yet. Be the first to contribute and help us grow the collection!

aboutCard.title: About
aboutCard.note: Remember! crush is free to use, anyone trying to reskin & sell it please tell us in our Discord server!

languageCard.title: Language
languageCard.description: Select your preferred language for crush.

windowVibrancyCard.title: Window Vibrancy
windowVibrancyCard.description: Choose the background blur effect for the application windows.

enableCrushRpcCard.title: Crush Discord RPC
enableCrushRpcCard.description: Toggle whether to show what you are doing using Discord RPC. Restart is recommended.

donateCard.title: Donate
donateCard.description: Love crush? Donate to Mally to support his work!
